paragraph:
Velmoria's question of (retribution)
One hundred and thirty-five years on, a (treason) trial tests whether justice can resist the lure of revenge
LET THIS chapter weigh the matter of (retribution). One hundred and thirty-five years after the marshal fell, Velmoria faces a case that strains its oldest (institution): the (prosecution) of a coastal (tycoon) accused of (treason) and (arson). The (contention) is not whether he is guilty—the evidence is (full-blown)—but whether the republic can punish him by the (canon) of law rather than the (wanton) appetite for revenge.
The (tycoon), a (baron) of the shipping trade whose fortune was made along the southern (lagoon), had grown too fond of his own power. By the public's (perception), he had moved from honest commerce to outright (deception)—suborning officials, paying a (liaison) to (jettison) inconvenient records, and at last conspiring to (subvention) a separatist movement in the (environ)s of the coast. The (inception) of his plot was greed; its (conception), a (presumption) that wealth placed him above the (constitution).
The (manifestation) of his (treason) was an act of (arson): the burning of a customs (barn) and the records it held, an attempt to (jettison) the evidence of his crimes. A night watchman died in the blaze. The (prosecution) was, by any measure, warranted; the only question was its (locution)—whether the republic would speak in the calm (elocution) of law or the (wanton) (circumlocution) of a mob.
The public mood ran hot. A (carillon) of outrage rang from every (lectern) and (pylon)-poster in the capital. Some demanded (retribution) without (diminution)—the sternest penalty the (canon) allowed. A populist (clown) of a politician, all (bravado) and (innuendo), staged a (lampoon) of the courts, accusing the judges of (abstention) and the prosecutors of (desertion). He cast himself as a (desperado) of the people, a (harpoon) aimed at the (tycoon)'s heart. His (sermon) was simple: (spurn) due process, and let the (treason) be answered in kind.
Recall how the marshal had handled such matters. He governed by (retribution) without (restitution)—a (wanton) (prosecution) of the innocent, a (presumption) of guilt against any rival. He would (suborn) witnesses, (jettison) the (constitution), and stage a (full-blown) show trial to the music of a state (bassoon). His justice was a (deception), his (elocution) a (circumlocution) of menace. He treated the courts as a (cavern) for burying enemies and the law as a (yarn) to be spun however he pleased. To him, (treason) meant only disloyalty to himself.
The republic, (chasten)ed by that memory, refused the (poltroon)'s easy path. Its prosecutors moved with cold (elocution), not (bravado). They sought no (wanton) (retribution) but a (full-blown) (prosecution) by the book—every (caption) of evidence catalogued, every (presumption) of innocence honoured until disproved. The (tycoon), for all his crimes, would be tried as a citizen, not (maroon)ed beyond the law's protection. To (jettison) due process for him, the prosecutors argued, would be to (jettison) it for all.
The trial was a study in patient (self-assertion) of principle. The defence raised every (contention)—(abstention) of a biased juror, (presumption) of political motive, (deception) in the gathering of evidence. The judges heard each with (stern) attention, neither swayed by the (carillon) of public anger nor cowed by the (tycoon)'s wealth. There was no (desertion) of duty, no (treason) against the (constitution) they served. The proceedings moved with the slow, sure (locomotion) of justice—an (ablution) of the republic's conscience.
The (tycoon) was convicted. But the sentence revealed the republic's true (credo). It chose (restitution) over pure (retribution): the (tycoon)'s fortune was seized not as plunder but as (restitution) to the watchman's family and to the public he had defrauded. He would serve his term, but the republic would not (suborn) cruelty in the name of justice. The (diminution) of his power was complete; the (destitution) of his victims was, so far as money could, repaired. There was retribution, yes—but bounded by the (canon), not (wanton).
The populist (clown) was furious. He had wanted a (full-blown) spectacle, a (desperado)'s reckoning, a (harpoon) through the heart of the elite. He railed that the sentence was an (abstention) from real justice, a (treason) against the people's anger. His (innuendo) and (bravado) reached a (full-blown) (diminuendo) of irrelevance as the public, by their own (perception), recognised the wisdom of restraint. They had no appetite to (shun) the law merely to (spurn) a villain. His (lampoon) of the courts fell flat as a stale (pun).
Beyond the trial, the (halcyon) life of the republic went on. The (monsoon) came and went; a (typhoon) brushed the coast and spared the (lagoon). Fishermen drew (salmon) and netted (plankton) from the cleaned waters; a (mason) repaired the old (cistern); a child drew the courthouse in (crayon) and a (unicorn) in the margin. Under a restored (fresco) in the town hall, a (carillon) rang the (halcyon) hours. An (acorn) fell by the (fern)-fringed path; a (greenhorn) clerk learned the law beside a (timeworn), (careworn), (shopworn) old judge who had seen a (gallon) of such cases. There was no (arson) now, no (treason) in the air—only the steady (locomotion) of ordinary days.
The case left its mark on the national (canon). The republic adjourned the trial—the judge's gavel and the formal (adjourn)ment marking not an end but a lesson learned. Schools would teach it: that (retribution) unbounded is itself a (treason) against justice; that (restitution) repairs what revenge only inflames; that a free people must (discern) the difference between punishing a crime and indulging a passion. The (colon) of the verdict—guilty, then the careful list of consequences—became a (canon) of restraint.
So Velmoria, one hundred and thirty-five years free, learns that the test of a justice (institution) is not its severity but its (discretion)—the (inborn) discipline to (discern) law from vengeance, (restitution) from (retribution), the calm (elocution) of the courts from the (wanton) (bravado) of the mob. The marshal ruled by (deception) and (suborn)ed every (institution) to his will; he made (treason) mean disloyalty to himself and justice a (cavern) for his enemies. His country, a century and more past his fall, has chosen the harder (credo): to try even the worst by the (canon), to answer (arson) and (treason) with law rather than (arson) and (treason) of its own, and to (mourn) the watchman not with a (wanton) (harpoon) of revenge but with the quiet (benison) of justice done—bounded, patient, and free.
translation:
韦尔莫利亚的（惩罚报应/retribution）问题

*历一百三十五年，一场（叛国/treason）审判考验着正义能否抵御复仇的诱惑*

让这一章掂量（惩罚报应/retribution）这件事。元帅倒台一百三十五年后，韦尔莫利亚面临一桩使它最古老（制度机构/institution）承受重压的案子：对一个沿海（巨头大亨/tycoon）的（起诉控告/prosecution)，他被控（叛国/treason）和（纵火/arson)。（争议焦点/contention）不在于他是否有罪——证据（确凿成型/full-blown)——而在于这个共和国能否以法律的（准则法典/canon）、而非（肆意妄为的/wanton）复仇胃口来惩罚他。

这个（大亨/tycoon)，一个在南方（潟湖/lagoon）一带发家的航运业（巨头/baron)，已变得太迷恋自己的权力。按公众的（认知感知/perception)，他已经从诚实的商业转向了彻头彻尾的（欺骗/deception)——收买官员、雇一个（联络中间人/liaison）去（抛弃丢弃/jettison）碍事的记录、并最终密谋去（资助补贴/subvention）沿海（周边地带/environ）的一场分离主义运动。他这阴谋的（开端起始/inception）是贪婪；它的（构想孕育/conception)，是一种财富使他凌驾于（宪法/constitution）之上的（自负擅断/presumption)。

他（叛国/treason）的（显现表现/manifestation）是一桩（纵火/arson）之举：烧毁一座海关（仓房/barn）和它所存的记录，企图（抛弃销毁/jettison）他罪行的证据。一名守夜人死于那场大火。这场（起诉/prosecution)，无论怎么衡量都是正当的；唯一的问题是它的（措辞表达方式/locution)——这个共和国究竟会以法律那平静的（言辞表达/elocution）来说话，还是以暴民那（肆意妄为的/wanton）（绕弯子兜圈/circumlocution)。

公众情绪火热。一阵义愤的（钟乐齐鸣/carillon）从首都每一座（讲台/lectern）和每一根（电线杆/pylon）海报上响起。一些人要求毫无（削减减损/diminution）的（惩罚报应/retribution）——（准则法典/canon）所允许的最严厉刑罚。一个民粹（小丑/clown）式的政客，满是（虚张声势/bravado）和（含沙射影/innuendo)，上演了一出对法庭的（讽刺嘲弄/lampoon)，指控法官们（弃权回避/abstention）、控方们（擅离职守/desertion)。他把自己塑造成人民的（亡命徒/desperado)、一支瞄准这（大亨/tycoon）心脏的（鱼叉/harpoon)。他的（布道说教/sermon）很简单：（摒弃唾弃/spurn）正当程序，让（叛国/treason）以牙还牙地被回应。

回想元帅当年是如何处置此类事情的。他靠没有（赔偿归还/restitution）的（惩罚报应/retribution）来统治——一种对无辜者（肆意妄为的/wanton）（起诉/prosecution)、一种对任何对手有罪的（擅断推定/presumption)。他会（收买教唆/suborn）证人、（抛弃/jettison）（宪法/constitution)、并配着一支国家（巴松管/bassoon）的乐声上演一场（彻头彻尾/full-blown）的作秀公审。他的正义是一场（欺骗/deception)，他的（言辞表达/elocution）是一套威胁的（绕弯子/circumlocution)。他把法庭当作一个埋葬敌人的（洞穴/cavern)、把法律当作一段（纱线故事/yarn)，随他高兴怎么编。在他看来，（叛国/treason）只意味着对他个人的不忠。

这个共和国，被那段记忆所（惩戒警醒/chasten)，拒绝了那（懦夫/poltroon）的轻巧之路。它的控方以冷静的（言辞表达/elocution)、而非（虚张声势/bravado）行事。他们不寻求（肆意妄为的/wanton）（惩罚报应/retribution)，而寻求一场（彻底成型/full-blown)、照章办事的（起诉/prosecution)——每一份证据的（标题说明/caption）都登记在案、每一份无罪（推定/presumption）在被推翻之前都受到尊重。这（大亨/tycoon)，尽管罪行累累，也将作为一个公民受审，而非被（放逐隔绝/maroon）于法律的保护之外。控方主张，为他（抛弃/jettison）正当程序，便是为所有人（抛弃/jettison）它。

这场审判是一项对原则耐心（坚守自我主张/self-assertion）的研究。辩方提出了每一项（争议主张/contention)——一名有偏见陪审员的（弃权回避/abstention)、政治动机的（推定/presumption)、取证中的（欺骗/deception)。法官们以（严正的/stern）专注聆听每一项，既不被公众愤怒的（钟乐齐鸣/carillon）所左右，也不被这（大亨/tycoon）的财富所吓退。没有对职责的（擅离/desertion)，没有对他们所服务之（宪法/constitution）的（背叛/treason)。审理以正义那缓慢、确凿的（行进移动/locomotion）推进着——一场这个共和国良知的（净身洗礼/ablution)。

这（大亨/tycoon）被定了罪。但那刑罚揭示出这个共和国真正的（信条/credo)。它选择了（赔偿归还/restitution）而非纯粹的（惩罚报应/retribution)：这（大亨/tycoon）的财产被没收，不是作为劫掠之物，而是作为给那守夜人家属、以及给被他诈骗之公众的（赔偿/restitution)。他将服他的刑期，但这个共和国不会以正义之名（教唆纵容/suborn）残忍。他权力的（削减/diminution）是彻底的；他受害者的（赤贫困顿/destitution)，在金钱所能及的限度内，得到了弥补。是有惩罚报应——但被那（准则法典/canon）所限定，而非（肆意妄为/wanton)。

那个民粹（小丑/clown）大为光火。他本想要一场（彻底成型的/full-blown）盛大场面、一场（亡命徒/desperado）式的清算、一支穿透精英心脏的（鱼叉/harpoon)。他怒斥这刑罚是对真正正义的（弃权回避/abstention)、是对人民愤怒的（背叛/treason)。随着公众凭他们自己的（认知/perception）认识到克制的智慧，他的（含沙射影/innuendo）和（虚张声势/bravado）抵达了一个（彻底/full-blown）的无关紧要（渐弱/diminuendo)。他们没有胃口仅仅为了（摒弃/spurn）一个恶棍而（回避躲开/shun）法律。他对法庭的（讽刺嘲弄/lampoon)，像一个走味的（双关语/pun）一样冷了场。

这场审判之外，这个共和国（宁静安详的/halcyon）生活继续着。（季风/monsoon）来了又去；一场（台风/typhoon）擦过海岸、放过了那（潟湖/lagoon)。渔夫们从清理过的水域里捞起（三文鱼/salmon）、网住（浮游生物/plankton)；一个（泥瓦匠/mason）修缮着那旧（蓄水池/cistern)；一个孩子用（蜡笔/crayon）画着法院、又在页边画了一只（独角兽/unicorn)。在市政厅一幅修复的（湿壁画/fresco）下，一阵（钟乐/carillon）敲响那（宁静的/halcyon）时辰。一颗（橡子/acorn）落在（蕨类/fern）镶边的小径旁；一个（新手生手/greenhorn）文书在一位（饱经岁月/timeworn)、（饱经忧患/careworn)、（陈旧老套的/shopworn）老法官身旁学习法律，这位法官见过一（加仑/gallon）这样的案子。如今再没有（纵火/arson)，空气中没有（叛国/treason)——只有寻常日子稳定的（行进/locomotion)。

这桩案子在民族（准则法典/canon）上留下了它的印记。这个共和国为审判（休庭/adjourn)——法官的法槌和那正式的（休庭/adjournment)，标记的不是一个终结，而是一课习得的教训。学校将讲授它：无限度的（惩罚报应/retribution）本身就是对正义的一种（背叛/treason)；（赔偿归还/restitution）修复复仇只会激化的东西；一个自由的民族必须（辨别/discern）惩罚一桩罪行与放纵一种激情之间的区别。那判决的（冒号/colon)——有罪，继而是审慎列出的诸般后果——成了一条克制的（准则/canon)。

于是韦尔莫利亚，自由了一百三十五载，领悟到：一个司法（机构/institution）的考验，不在于它的严厉，而在于它的（审慎裁量/discretion)——那份去（辨别/discern）法律与复仇、（赔偿/restitution）与（惩罚报应/retribution)、法庭那平静的（言辞表达/elocution）与暴民那（肆意妄为的/wanton）（虚张声势/bravado）之区别的（与生俱来的/inborn）自律。元帅靠（欺骗/deception）来统治、把每一个（机构/institution）都（教唆收买/suborn）于他的意志；他让（叛国/treason）意味着对他个人的不忠、让正义成为埋葬他敌人的一个（洞穴/cavern)。他的国家，在他倒台一个多世纪之后，选择了那更艰难的（信条/credo)：以那（准则法典/canon）去审判哪怕是最坏之人、以法律、而非以它自己的（纵火/arson）与（叛国/treason)，去回应（纵火/arson）与（叛国/treason)、并去（哀悼/mourn）那守夜人——不是以一支（肆意妄为的/wanton）复仇（鱼叉/harpoon)，而是以正义得以伸张那静默的（祝福/benison)：有界限、有耐心、而自由。
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -ify 大家族：全部40+个词来自拉丁语 facere（做），后缀 -ify = 使成为

• anthology：antho（花）+ logy（收集），收集的花=文学选集，chrysanthemum（菊花）同根

• -logy 20+家族：pharmacology/archaeology/speleology 等，全来自希腊 logos（学问）

• atrophy：a（无）+ trophe（营养），缺乏营养=萎缩，trophy（奖杯=营养的成果）同根

• allergy：allos（其他）+ erg（活动），对其他物质的异常活动反应=过敏

• eulogy vs. elegy：eulogy=好话（eu好）/颂词，elegy=哀歌（eleeos哀叹）

• edify：来自拉丁语"建造神庙"，建造精神=启发教诲，edifice（大厦）同根

quiz.question: ____ retention
quiz.explanation: 保留, 数据保留. The company has a strict data retention policy. 公司有严格的数据保留政策。 | re->回，ten->持有，retention->持续持有=保留（cf. retain保留，detain拘留，contain容纳）

quiz.question: _____ __ contention
quiz.explanation: 争论, 争论点. The budget became a major point of contention. 预算成为主要的争论点。 | con->共同，tent->伸展/争夺，contention->共同争夺=争论（cf. content内容，intend意图，tension紧张）

quiz.question: ______ abstention
quiz.explanation: 弃权, 政策弃权. Several members chose policy abstention on the vote. 几名成员在投票中选择了政策弃权。 | abs->离开，ten->持有，abstention->不持任何立场=弃权（cf. abstain弃权，abstinence禁欲）

quiz.question: _________ distention
quiz.explanation: 膨胀, 腹部膨胀. The patient complained of abdominal distention. 患者抱怨腹部膨胀。 | dis->向外，tent->伸展，distention->向外伸展=膨胀（cf. distend膨胀，extend延伸，tension紧张）

quiz.question: __________ subvention
quiz.explanation: 补助金, 政府补助金. The theater received government subvention. 剧院获得了政府补助金。 | sub->在下，ven->来，subvention->从下面来的钱=补助金（cf. subsidy补贴，convention惯例，intervene干预）

quiz.question: ______ locomotion
quiz.explanation: 移动, 动物移动. Scientists study animal locomotion patterns. 科学家研究动物移动模式。 | loco->地方（拉丁locus），mot->移动，locomotion->从一个地方移到另一个=移动（cf. local地方，motion运动）

quiz.question: _____ caption
quiz.explanation: 标题, 图片标题. The image caption explained the photo. 图片标题解释了照片。 | capt->抓取（拉丁capere），caption->抓住注意力的标题（cf. capture捕获，captivate吸引）

quiz.question: deception ____
quiz.explanation: 欺骗, 欺骗计划. The military used a deception plan. 军方使用了欺骗计划。 | de->向下，cept->抓取，deception->把人往下带=欺骗（cf. reception接待，perception感知，intercept拦截）

quiz.question: _______ inception
quiz.explanation: 开始, 项目开始. The project inception was in 2020. 项目开始于2020年。 | in->进入，cept->抓取/开始，inception->开始抓取=开端（cf. concept概念，except除外，deception欺骗）

quiz.question: __________ conception
quiz.explanation: 受孕, 圣灵感孕. Catholics celebrate the immaculate conception. 天主教徒庆祝圣灵感孕。 | con->共同，cept->抓取/孕育，conception->共同孕育=受孕/概念（cf. concept概念，perceive感知）

quiz.question: ______ perception
quiz.explanation: 感知, 视觉感知. Visual perception affects our understanding. 视觉感知影响我们的理解。 | per->穿透，cept->抓取，perception->穿透抓取信息=感知（cf. deceive欺骗，receive接收，conceive构思）

quiz.question: ______'_ prescription
quiz.explanation: 处方, 医生处方. The pharmacy filled the doctor's prescription. 药房配了医生的处方。 | pre->提前，script->写，prescription->提前写下的=处方（cf. describe描述，manuscript手稿，subscribe订阅）

quiz.question: ____ presumption
quiz.explanation: 假定, 大胆的假定. His bold presumption proved incorrect. 他大胆的假定证明是不正确的。 | pre->提前，sumpt->取用，presumption->提前取用=假定/冒失（cf. assume假设，consume消费，resume继续）

quiz.question: ________ desertion
quiz.explanation: 开小差, 军事开小差. The soldier faced charges of military desertion. 士兵面临军事开小差的指控。 | de->离开，sert->连接/束缚，desertion->离开部队=开小差（cf. assert断言，desert沙漠/抛弃，insert插入）

quiz.question: _______ self-assertion
quiz.explanation: 自我主张, 健康的自我主张. Therapy encouraged healthy self-assertion. 治疗鼓励健康的自我主张。 | as->朝向，sert->连接宣告，assertion->向外宣告=主张（cf. desert抛弃，insert插入，dissertation论文）

quiz.question: ___ digestion
quiz.explanation: 消化, 帮助消化. Walking after meals can aid digestion. 饭后散步可以帮助消化。 | di->分开，gest->携带/消化（拉丁gerere），digestion->分开携带消化（cf. ingest摄取，suggest建议，gesture姿态）

quiz.question: ____ ingestion
quiz.explanation: 摄取, 食物摄取. Food ingestion should be monitored carefully. 食物摄取应该仔细监测。 | in->进入，gest->携带，ingestion->携带进入体内=摄取（cf. digest消化，suggest建议，congest拥塞）

quiz.question: ______ retribution
quiz.explanation: 报应, 神圣的报应. They believed in divine retribution. 他们相信神圣的报应。 | re->回，tribut->给予，retribution->给回去=报应（cf. tribute贡品，distribute分配，contribute贡献）

quiz.question: ________ prosecution
quiz.explanation: 起诉, 刑事起诉. The case proceeded to criminal prosecution. 案件进入刑事起诉程序。 | pro->向前，secut->追随，prosecution->一路追到底=起诉（cf. execute执行，consecutive连续的，persecute迫害）

quiz.question: ___ locution
quiz.explanation: 措辞, 奇怪的措辞. His speech contained an odd locution. 他的演讲包含奇怪的措辞。 | locut->说话（拉丁loqui），locution->说话方式=措辞（cf. eloquent雄辩的，circumlocution迂回说法）

quiz.question: elocution ______
quiz.explanation: 演讲技巧, 演讲技巧课. She took elocution lesson to improve speaking. 她上演讲技巧课来提高演讲能力。 | e->向外，locut->说话，elocution->向外说出=演讲技巧（cf. eloquent雄辩的，colloquial口语的）

quiz.question: _______ circumlocution
quiz.explanation: 迂回说法, 无休止的迂回说法. His endless circumlocution confused listeners. 他无休止的迂回说法使听众困惑。 | circum->绕圈，locut->说话，circumlocution->绕圈子说话=迂回说法（cf. circuit回路，circumference周长）

quiz.question: _______ ablution
quiz.explanation: 沐浴, 晨浴. He performed his morning ablution ritual. 他进行了晨浴仪式。 | ab->离开，lut->洗（拉丁luere），ablution->洗去污垢=沐浴（cf. dilute稀释，pollute污染，solution溶液）

quiz.question: _______ diminution
quiz.explanation: 减少, 逐渐减少. There was a gradual diminution in quality. 质量出现了逐渐减少。 | dimin->减小（拉丁diminuere），diminution->逐渐减小=减少（cf. diminish减少，dimension维度，minor次要的）

quiz.question: _____ destitution
quiz.explanation: 贫困, 完全的贫困. Refugees faced utter destitution. 难民面临完全的贫困。 | de->去除，stit->站立/放置，destitution->把支撑移走=贫困（cf. destitute贫困的，constitute构成，substitute替代）

quiz.question: ____ restitution
quiz.explanation: 赔偿, 进行赔偿. The thief agreed to make restitution. 小偷同意进行赔偿。 | re->重新，stit->放置/恢复，restitution->重新放置归还=赔偿（cf. restore恢复，institution机构，constitute构成）

quiz.question: ___________ institution
quiz.explanation: 机构, 教育机构. Universities are important educational institution. 大学是重要的教育机构。 | in->进入，stit->站立/建立，institution->建立起来的组织=机构（cf. constitute构成，substitute替代，prostitute卖淫）

quiz.question: _______ constitution
quiz.explanation: 宪法, 成文宪法. The country has a written constitution. 该国有成文宪法。 | con->共同，stit->建立，constitution->共同建立的根本法=宪法/体质（cf. institution机构，substitute替代）

quiz.question: gallon ___
quiz.explanation: 加仑, 加仑罐. She filled a gallon jug with water. 她用水装满了加仑罐。 | gallon->液量单位（古法语jalon），约3.79升（美制）或4.55升（英制）

quiz.question: ____ carillon
quiz.explanation: 钟琴, 钟琴. The bell carillon played at noon. 钟琴在中午演奏。 | quadrilion->四钟组（古法语，carre->四），carillon->一组编钟=钟琴（教堂里一组用键盘控制的铜钟）

quiz.question: colon ______
quiz.explanation: 结肠, 结肠癌. Screening helps detect colon cancer early. 筛查有助于早期发现结肠癌。 | colon->结肠（希腊kolon->大肠），colon->结肠/冒号（标点符号形似肠道节段）

quiz.question: _____ pylon
quiz.explanation: 电线杆, 电力塔. Power pylon lines crossed the countryside. 电力塔线路穿越乡村。 | pylon->大门（希腊pylon->高大入口），pylon->电力塔/航标（高耸如门）

quiz.question: ____ salmon
quiz.explanation: 鲑鱼, 野生鲑鱼. Wild salmon swim upstream to spawn. 野生鲑鱼逆流而上产卵。 | salmon->鲑鱼（拉丁salmo，来自salire->跳跃），salmon->鲑鱼（以跳跃逆流著称，l不发音）

quiz.question: ______ sermon
quiz.explanation: 布道, 星期日布道. The pastor delivered his Sunday sermon. 牧师发表了星期日布道。 | serm->说话（拉丁sermo->谈话），sermon->宗教训诫=布道（cf. sermonize说教）

quiz.question: ______ canon
quiz.explanation: 教规, 教会教规. Church canon governs religious practices. 教会教规管理宗教活动。 | canon->直尺/规则（希腊kanon），canon->教规/经典（cf. canonical经典的，canyon峡谷=笔直切割）

quiz.question: _ boon __
quiz.explanation: 恩惠, 对...的恩惠. The new road is a boon to commerce. 新路对商业是恩惠。 | boon->恩赐（古挪威bon->请求），boon->恩惠/好处（cf. boon companion亲密伙伴）

quiz.question: ____ cocoon
quiz.explanation: 茧, 丝茧. The caterpillar spins a silk cocoon. 毛虫吐丝茧。 | coque->贝壳（法语），cocoon->像贝壳一样包裹的茧（cf. cocooning宅在家里）

quiz.question: ____ ______ tycoon
quiz.explanation: 大亨, 房地产大亨. The real estate tycoon owned many properties. 房地产大亨拥有许多房产。 | taikun->大君（日语，将军称号），tycoon->工商业大亨（黑船事件后传入英语）

quiz.question: _______ lagoon
quiz.explanation: 泻湖, 沿海泻湖. The coastal lagoon teemed with fish. 沿海泻湖充满了鱼。 | lacus->湖（拉丁），lagoon->浅水湖泊（威尼斯语laguna，cf. lake湖，lacuna空白/缺口）

quiz.question: _______ typhoon
quiz.explanation: 台风, 太平洋台风. A powerful Pacific typhoon approached. 一场强大的太平洋台风正在逼近。 | Typhon->希腊风暴之神，台风->来自中文「大风」，两者融合形成typhoon

quiz.question: lampoon _ __________
quiz.explanation: 讽刺, 讽刺政客. The comedian would lampoon a politician. 喜剧演员会讽刺政客。 | lampoon->讽刺文章（法语lampon->饮酒歌），lampoon->尖刻讽刺（cf. lampooner讽刺作家）

quiz.question: _____ _ harpoon
quiz.explanation: 鱼叉, 投掷鱼叉. The whaler prepared to throw a harpoon. 捕鲸人准备投掷鱼叉。 | harpe->钩子（希腊），harpoon->有钩的叉=鱼叉（cf. harpy希腊神话中的爪形怪物）

quiz.question: marooned ______
quiz.explanation: 困住, 被困的水手. The marooned sailor was stranded on an island. 被困的水手被困在岛上。 | maroon->栗色/遗弃（加勒比语，逃跑的奴隶），marooned->被遗弃在荒岛上=被困

quiz.question: ________ poltroon
quiz.explanation: 懦夫, 懦弱的懦夫. The cowardly poltroon fled from battle. 懦弱的懦夫从战场逃跑。 | poltro->懒惰（意大利语），poltroon->懒惰懦弱之人=懦夫（cf. craven懦弱的）

quiz.question: ______ monsoon
quiz.explanation: 季风, 夏季季风. The summer monsoon brings heavy rains. 夏季季风带来大雨。 | mawsim->季节（阿拉伯语），monsoon->季节性风=季风（随季节转换方向的风）

quiz.question: bassoon ____
quiz.explanation: 巴松管, 巴松管独奏. The musician performed a bassoon solo. 音乐家演奏了巴松管独奏。 | basso->低音（意大利语），bassoon->低音管乐器=巴松管（cf. bass低音，baritone男中音）

quiz.question: _____ baron
quiz.explanation: 男爵, 媒体大亨. The media baron owned several newspapers. 媒体大亨拥有几家报纸。 | baro->战士/贵族（古日耳曼），baron->贵族/大亨（cf. baroness女男爵，baronial男爵的）

quiz.question: ____ gridiron
quiz.explanation: 烤架, 铁烤架. They cooked meat on an iron gridiron. 他们在铁烤架上烤肉。 | grid->格栅，iron->铁，gridiron->格栅状铁架=烤架（也指美式橄榄球场的格线）

quiz.question: environ ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 围绕, 围绕城市. Mountains environ the city on all sides. 群山从四面环绕城市。 | en->使，viron->圆圈（法语viron->转圈），environ->围绕（cf. environment环境，environs周边地区）

quiz.question: ____ neutron
quiz.explanation: 中子, 自由中子. Nuclear reactions release free neutron. 核反应释放自由中子。 | neuter->中性（拉丁），neutron->电中性的粒子=中子（cf. neutral中立的，neutralize中和）

quiz.question: ______ treason
quiz.explanation: 叛国, 犯叛国罪. The spy was accused of commit treason. 间谍被指控犯叛国罪。 | trad->交给（拉丁tradere），treason->把国家交给敌人=叛国（cf. tradition传统=传下去，betray出卖）

quiz.question: _______ mason
quiz.explanation: 石匠, 熟练的石匠. The skilled mason built beautiful walls. 熟练的石匠建造了美丽的墙。 | mason->石匠（古法语maçon），mason->砌石工人（cf. Freemasonry共济会，masonry砌石工艺）

quiz.question: liaison _______
quiz.explanation: 联络, 联络官. The liaison officer coordinated efforts. 联络官协调工作。 | liais->绑（法语lier->绑），liaison->绑在一起=联络/联系（cf. lien留置权，rely依赖）

quiz.question: ____ benison
quiz.explanation: 祝福, 给予祝福. The elder would give benison to travelers. 长者会给旅行者祝福。 | bene->好（拉丁），son->声音/说，benison->说好话=祝福（cf. benediction祝福，bonus奖金）

quiz.question: ____ comparison
quiz.explanation: 比较, 进行比较. We should make comparison between options. 我们应该在选项之间进行比较。 | com->共同，par->相等，comparison->放在一起比较相等性=比较（cf. compare比较，pair一对，parity平等）

quiz.question: jettison _____
quiz.explanation: 抛弃, 抛弃货物. The ship had to jettison cargo in the storm. 船在风暴中不得不抛弃货物。 | jeter->抛（法语），jettison->从船上抛出=抛弃（cf. jet喷射，eject弹出，jetsam抛弃物）

quiz.question: ______ arson
quiz.explanation: 纵火, 犯纵火罪. The suspect was charged with commit arson. 嫌疑人被指控犯纵火罪。 | ars->燃烧（拉丁ardere），arson->故意放火=纵火（cf. ardent热情的，ardor热情，arid干燥的）

quiz.question: ______ baton
quiz.explanation: 警棍, 警察警棍. Officers carried a police baton. 警官携带警察警棍。 | baton->棍子（法语），baton->指挥棒/警棍/接力棒（cf. battery电池，battle战役，bat球棒）

quiz.question: _______ simpleton
quiz.explanation: 傻瓜, 村里的傻瓜. The village simpleton was often mocked. 村里的傻瓜经常被嘲笑。 | simple->简单/头脑简单，ton->人（后缀），simpleton->头脑简单的人=傻瓜（cf. singleton单身，skeleton骨架）

quiz.question: ______ plankton
quiz.explanation: 浮游生物, 海洋浮游生物. Whales feed on marine plankton. 鲸鱼以海洋浮游生物为食。 | planktos->漂流（希腊），plankton->随水漂流的微生物=浮游生物（cf. planet行星=游荡的星）

quiz.question: wanton ___________
quiz.explanation: 肆意的, 肆意的破坏. The war caused wanton destruction. 战争造成了肆意的破坏。 | wan->缺乏，ton->训练（古英语），wanton->缺乏管束训练的=肆意的/放荡的

quiz.question: mutton ____
quiz.explanation: 羊肉, 羊肉炖菜. The cook prepared mutton stew. 厨师准备了羊肉炖菜。 | mouton->羊（法语），mutton->羊肉（注意区分lamb小羊肉，mutton是成年羊肉）

quiz.question: ___ crayon
quiz.explanation: 蜡笔, 蜡笔. Children drew pictures with wax crayon. 孩子们用蜡笔画画。 | craie->粉笔（法语，来自拉丁creta->白垩），crayon->粉笔/蜡笔（cf. chalk粉笔）

quiz.question: halcyon ____
quiz.explanation: 宁静的, 宁静的日子. She remembered the halcyon days of youth. 她记得青春宁静的日子。 | Halcyon->翠鸟（希腊神话中可平息海浪筑巢），halcyon days->冬至前后的宁静天气=幸福安宁的往日

quiz.question: blazon ____
quiz.explanation: 纹章, 纹章. The knight's blazon arms adorned his shield. 骑士的纹章装饰了他的盾牌。 | blazon->盾形（古法语），blazon->纹章/公开宣扬（cf. blaze火焰/标记，emblazon装饰纹章）

quiz.question: barn ___
quiz.explanation: 谷仓, 仓鸮. A barn owl nested in the rafters. 一只仓鸮在椽子上筑巢。 | bere->大麦，aern->房屋（古英语），barn->存谷物的房子=谷仓（cf. barnyard谷仓院，barn dance谷仓舞）

quiz.question: ____ _ yarn
quiz.explanation: 纱线, 讲故事. The old sailor would spin a yarn. 老水手会讲故事。 | yarn->纱线（古英语gearn），spin a yarn->纺纱线=讲（漫长的）故事（水手纺绳时讲故事）

quiz.question: discern ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 识别, 识别模式. Scientists tried to discern the pattern. 科学家试图识别模式。 | dis->分开，cern->筛选（拉丁cernere），discern->分开筛选=识别（cf. concern关心，secret秘密，discrete分离的）

quiz.question: fern _____
quiz.explanation: 蕨类, 蕨叶. The fern frond unfurled in spring. 蕨叶在春天展开。 | fern->蕨类（古英语fearn），frond->蕨叶/棕榈叶（拉丁frons->叶片）

quiz.question: _______ lectern
quiz.explanation: 讲台, 讲台. The professor stood at the lecture lectern. 教授站在讲台上。 | lect->读/说（拉丁legere），lectern->读经/演讲用的台子=讲台（cf. lecture演讲，select选择，collect收集）

quiz.question: stern _______
quiz.explanation: 严厉的, 严厉的警告. The judge issued a stern warning. 法官发出了严厉的警告。 | stern->严厉（古英语styrne），stern->严厉的/船尾（一词两义，cf. austerity严格）

quiz.question: _____ cistern
quiz.explanation: 蓄水池, 蓄水池. The water cistern collected rainwater. 蓄水池收集雨水。 | cist->箱/容器（拉丁cista），cistern->装水的容器=蓄水池（cf. chest箱子，cyst囊肿）

quiz.question: _________ cavern
quiz.explanation: 洞穴, 石灰岩洞穴. Explorers discovered a limestone cavern. 探险者发现了石灰岩洞穴。 | cav->空洞（拉丁cavus），cavern->大型空洞=洞穴（cf. cave洞穴，cavity龋洞，excavate挖掘）

quiz.question: inborn ______
quiz.explanation: 天生的, 天生的才能. She possessed inborn talent for music. 她拥有音乐的天生才能。 | in->在内，born->出生，inborn->出生时就有的=天生的（cf. innate天生的，congenital先天的）

quiz.question: suborn _______
quiz.explanation: 唆使, 唆使伪证. The lawyer tried to suborn perjury. 律师试图唆使伪证。 | sub->秘密地/在下，orn->装备（拉丁ornare），suborn->秘密装备某人做坏事=唆使（cf. ornament装饰）

quiz.question: ___ acorn
quiz.explanation: 橡子, 橡树橡子. Squirrels gather oak acorn in autumn. 松鼠在秋天收集橡树橡子。 | ac->橡树（古英语æc），corn->种子，acorn->橡树的种子=橡子（cf. oak橡树）

quiz.question: ________ unicorn
quiz.explanation: 独角兽, 神话独角兽. Stories tell of the mythical unicorn. 故事讲述神话独角兽。 | uni->一，corn->角（拉丁cornu），unicorn->一只角的动物=独角兽（cf. cornea角膜，corner角落）

quiz.question: ____ ___ horn
quiz.explanation: 号角, 吹号角. The herald would blow the horn. 传令官会吹号角。 | horn->角/号角（古英语），horn->动物的角/号角/喇叭（cf. unicorn独角兽，cornucopia丰饶角）

quiz.question: ________ greenhorn
quiz.explanation: 新手, 商业新手. The business greenhorn made rookie mistakes. 商业新手犯了新手错误。 | green->青涩，horn->角（新长出的嫩角），greenhorn->嫩角=没经验的新手（cf. rookie新手）

quiz.question: timeworn _____é
quiz.explanation: 陈旧的, 陈旧的陈词滥调. The speech used timeworn cliché. 演讲使用了陈旧的陈词滥调。 | time->时间，worn->磨损，timeworn->被时间磨损的=陈旧的（cf. shopworn/careworn同类复合词）

quiz.question: careworn ____
quiz.explanation: 饱经风霜的, 饱经风霜的脸. Her careworn face showed years of struggle. 她饱经风霜的脸显示出多年的挣扎。 | care->忧虑，worn->磨损，careworn->被忧虑磨损的=饱经风霜的

quiz.question: shopworn _____
quiz.explanation: 陈腐的, 陈腐的想法. The proposal contained shopworn ideas. 提案包含陈腐的想法。 | shop->商店，worn->磨损，shopworn->在店里摆太久磨损的=陈腐的（cf. timeworn/careworn同类）

quiz.question: adjourn ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 休会, 休会. The chairman decided to adjourn the meeting. 主席决定休会。 | ad->朝向，journ->天（法语jour），adjourn->推迟到另一天=休会（cf. journey旅程，journal日记，sojourn逗留）

quiz.question: mourn _____
quiz.explanation: 哀悼, 哀悼死亡. The nation gathered to mourn death. 全国聚集哀悼死亡。 | mourn->哀悼（古英语murnan），mourn->为...哀悼（cf. mournful悲哀的，mourning服丧）

quiz.question: spurn __ _____
quiz.explanation: 拒绝, 拒绝提议. He decided to spurn an offer. 他决定拒绝提议. | spurn->用脚踢开（古英语spurnan），spurn->轻蔑地拒绝（cf. spur马刺，spurn=用马刺踢开）

quiz.question: shun _________
quiz.explanation: 避开, 避开公众关注. The recluse chose to shun publicity. 隐士选择避开公众关注。 | shun->回避（古英语scunian），shun->故意避开（cf. eschew避免，shy羞怯/回避）

quiz.question: ____ _ pun
quiz.explanation: 双关语, 说双关语. The comedian would make a pun. 喜剧演员会说双关语。 | pun->双关（来源不明，可能来自pundigion），pun->利用词语多义的文字游戏（cf. play on words文字游戏）

quiz.question: spawn _____
quiz.explanation: 产生, 产生想法. Brainstorming sessions spawn ideas. 头脑风暴会议产生想法。 | spawn->展开（古法语espandre），spawn->（鱼）产卵/大量产生（cf. expand扩展，span跨度）

quiz.question: full-blown ______
quiz.explanation: 全面的, 全面的危机. The situation became a full-blown crisis. 情况变成了全面的危机。 | full->完全，blown->吹开/盛开，full-blown->完全盛开的=全面的（cf. blow-up扩大，outblown已吹过的）

quiz.question: _____ clown
quiz.explanation: 小丑, 班级小丑. He was known as the class clown. 他被称为班级小丑。 | clown->乡巴佬/小丑（来源不明，cf. clod泥块），class clown->班里爱搞笑的人

quiz.question: ____ crown
quiz.explanation: 王冠, 金王冠. The king wore a gold crown. 国王戴着金王冠。 | coron->王冠（拉丁corona），crown->王冠（cf. coronation加冕，corona光冕，coroner验尸官）

quiz.question: ____ fresco
quiz.explanation: 壁画, 墙壁壁画. Michelangelo painted a famous wall fresco. 米开朗基罗绘制了著名的墙壁壁画。 | fresco->新鲜（意大利语fresco->fresh），fresco->在新鲜湿灰泥上作画=壁画（cf. fresh新鲜）

quiz.question: ________ tornado
quiz.explanation: 龙卷风, 强大的龙卷风. A powerful tornado destroyed homes. 强大的龙卷风摧毁了房屋。 | tronada->雷雨（西班牙语tornar->转），tornado->旋转的风暴=龙卷风（cf. turn转，tournament锦标赛）

quiz.question: ______ desperado
quiz.explanation: 亡命之徒, 蒙面亡命之徒. The masked desperado robbed the bank. 蒙面亡命之徒抢劫了银行。 | desesperado->绝望的人（西班牙语），desperado->走投无路的亡命之徒（cf. desperate绝望的）

quiz.question: _____ bravado
quiz.explanation: 虚张声势, 自大的虚张声势. His cocky bravado hid insecurity. 他自大的虚张声势掩盖了不安全感。 | bravado->勇敢（西班牙语bravata），bravado->表演出来的勇气=虚张声势（cf. brave勇敢，bravo喝彩）

quiz.question: ____ _ torpedo
quiz.explanation: 鱼雷, 发射鱼雷. The submarine prepared to fire a torpedo. 潜艇准备发射鱼雷。 | torpedo->电鳐（拉丁，会放电麻痹猎物），torpedo->鱼雷（形似电鳐，cf. torpor麻木，torpid迟钝）

quiz.question: _________ credo
quiz.explanation: 信条, 公司信条. The corporate credo emphasized integrity. 公司信条强调诚信。 | credo->我相信（拉丁，信经第一词），credo->信条（cf. creed信条，credit信用，credible可信的）

quiz.question: _____ tuxedo
quiz.explanation: 礼服, 黑色礼服. The groom wore a black tuxedo. 新郎穿着黑色礼服。 | Tuxedo->纽约塔克西多公园（地名），1886年首次在此俱乐部穿着=无尾礼服

quiz.question: _______ diminuendo
quiz.explanation: 渐弱, 逐渐渐弱. The music ended in a gradual diminuendo. 音乐在逐渐渐弱中结束。 | diminuendo->渐弱（意大利音乐术语），来自dimin->减小，diminuendo->逐渐减弱（cf. diminish减少，crescendo渐强）

quiz.question: ____ innuendo
quiz.explanation: 影射, 阴暗的影射. The speech contained dark innuendo. 演讲包含阴暗的影射。 | innuendo->通过暗示（拉丁，法律术语），innuendo->暗中影射=影射（cf. nod点头，nudge轻推暗示）
